What pass requires: The prompt specifies vintage poster / golden-age illustration style — bold lines; limited warm palette; high contrast; explicitly not photorealistic
Notes: Keeps the book visually coherent across profiles

What pass requires: The woman is the central figure; confident and mid-action rather than posed
Notes: She is doing the brave thing; not sitting for a portrait

What pass requires: The prompt names specific era-correct props; technology; or setting details; and the assistant noted what it included and why
Notes: A 1930s lab should not contain a 1970s microscope

What pass requires: The prompt describes her real documented appearance (face shape; skin tone; hair; build; age) and forbids idealizing; lightening; or de-aging her
Notes: Recognition; not idealization — this is a core value of the book

What pass requires: The prompt explicitly requests no text; lettering; or captions in the image
Notes: Text is added at the design stage; not by the image model

What pass requires: Exactly one complete prompt is provided; usable as-is in DALL-E or Midjourney without assembly
Notes: The author should not have to stitch fragments together
